headline: Here Are Friday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Best Buy, Cogent Communications, Dell Technologies, EPAM Systems, Federal Realty, Gap, Snowflake, Viper Energy, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after yet another winning day for Wall Street, as all major indices finished the day higher after starting the session lower. Once again, all four indices we track for readers posted all-time highs as the AI/Data Center, Memory Chip rally continues to roll on. Healthcare and consumer stocks ... headline: Why Barclays sees more downside risk for digital IT services
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays has reiterated a cautious stance on the IT services sector, downgrading EPAM Systems and Grid Dynamics to Hold while warning that the demand environment carries more downside risk than upside as artificial intelligence continues to reshape the industry.

headline: Jefferies Downgrades EPAM Systems to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $110
summary: Jefferies  analyst Surinder Thind   downgrades EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $130 to $110.
